welcome: рџљЂ WARP Config Generator в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ Generate Cloudflare WARP VPN configs in multiple formats with one tap. рџ“‹ Supported formats: рџ”ђ WireGuard рџ›ЎпёЏ AmneziaWG вљ”пёЏ Clash / Clash Meta рџЄџ WireSock (Windows) Use the menu below to get started в¬‡пёЏ
help:
вќ“ Help & Guides в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ рџ“– How to add a custom DNS server Open configs/dns_servers.json and add: 
{
  "name": "My DNS",
  "servers": ["10.0.0.1", "10.0.0.2"]
}
рџ“– How to add a relay endpoint Open configs/relay_servers.json and add:

  "name": "Custom Relay",

}
рџ“– How to add a split-tunnel service Open configs/routing_services.json and add:

  "name": "My Service",
  "routes": ["203.0.113.0/24"]
}
рџ”„ Restart the bot after editing config files. рџ› пёЏ Commands: /start вЂ” show welcome & menu /cancel вЂ” cancel current generation
